creek.example: We caught small fish in the creek.

cripple.example: The strike crippled the train service.
cripple.example_zh: 罷工讓火車服務陷入癱瘓。

cripple.example: The accident crippled him for life.
cripple.example_zh: 那場意外讓他終生殘疾。

criterion-criteria.example: Price is one criterion when we buy a car.
criterion-criteria.example_zh: 價格是我們買車的標準之一。

crude.example: They make fuel from crude oil.

cruise.example: They took a cruise around the islands.
The boat cruised along the coast.

crystal.example: The lake water was as clear as crystal.

cuisine.example: I love the spicy cuisine of Thailand.

currency.example: The dollar is a common currency.

curriculum.example: Art is part of the school curriculum.
curriculum.example_zh: 美術是學校課程的一部分。

custody.example: The mother got custody of the children.
custody.example_zh: 母親取得了孩子的監護權。

custody.example: The suspect is in police custody.

customs.example: We passed through customs at the airport.

deadly.example_zh: 這種蛇的咬傷是致命的。

debris.example: Debris covered the road after the storm.
debris.example_zh: 暴風雨後碎片散落滿路。

debut.example: The singer made her debut on TV.
debut.example_zh: 那位歌手在電視上初次登場。

decay.example: The old house fell into decay.

deceive.example: Don't let his smile deceive you.

declaration.example: They signed a declaration of friendship.
declaration.example_zh: 他們簽署了一份友好宣言。

decline.example_zh: 上個月銷售量大幅下降。

dedicate.example: She dedicated her life to teaching.

defendant.example: The defendant stood before the judge.

deficit.example: The country has a large budget deficit.
deficit.example_zh: 這個國家有龐大的預算赤字。

delegate.example: Each country sent a delegate to the meeting.
delegate.example_zh: 每個國家派一名代表參加會議。

delegate.example: A good leader knows how to delegate.

delegation.example: A delegation visited the new factory.
delegation.example_zh: 一個代表團參觀了新工廠。

deliberate.example: It was a deliberate choice, not an accident.
deliberate.example_zh: 那是個刻意的選擇，不是意外。

deliberate.example: The judges deliberated for an hour.

democrat.example: He is a strong democrat who values freedom.
democrat.example_zh: 他是個重視自由的堅定民主主義者。

denial.example: His denial did not convince the police.
denial.example_zh: 他的否認沒能讓警方信服。

density.example: The forest has a high density of trees.
density.example_zh: 這片森林的樹木密度很高。

depict.example: The painting depicts a quiet village.
depict.example_zh: 這幅畫描繪了一個寧靜的村莊。

deploy.example: They deployed workers to fix the road.

depress.example_zh: 連日陰雨讓她心情低落。

deputy.example: The deputy ran the office while the boss was away.
deputy.example_zh: 老闆不在時由副手管理辦公室。

derive.example: Many English words derive from Latin.
derive.example_zh: 許多英文字源自拉丁文。

descriptive.example: She wrote a descriptive paragraph about the sea.
descriptive.example_zh: 她寫了一段描寫大海的文字。

despair.example: She felt despair after losing her job.
despair.example_zh: 失去工作後她感到絕望。

despair.example: Don't despair; things will get better.

destination.example_zh: 我們的最終目的地是東京。

destiny.example: She believed it was her destiny to teach.
destiny.example_zh: 她相信教書是她的天命。

destructive.example: The fire was sudden and destructive.
destructive.example_zh: 那場火又突然又具破壞性。

devotion.example: Her devotion to her family is clear.
devotion.example_zh: 她對家人的摯愛顯而易見。

diagnose.example: The doctor diagnosed the illness quickly.

diagnosis.example: The diagnosis showed a minor problem.
diagnosis.example_zh: 診斷顯示只是個小問題。

dialect.example: People in the south speak a different dialect.
dialect.example_zh: 南部的人說不同的方言。

diameter.example: The circle has a diameter of ten centimeters.
diameter.example_zh: 這個圓的直徑是十公分。

digestion.example: A walk after meals helps digestion.

dilemma.example_zh: 她面臨一個難以抉擇的困境。

dimension.example: We measured every dimension of the box.
dimension.example_zh: 我們測量了箱子的每個尺寸。

dimension.example: The problem has a moral dimension.

diminish.example: The noise diminished as the train left.
diminish.example_zh: 火車駛離後噪音逐漸減弱。

diplomatic.example: She handled the issue in a diplomatic way.
diplomatic.example_zh: 她以圓融的方式處理這件事。

directory.example: I found his number in the directory.
directory.example_zh: 我在通訊錄裡找到他的號碼。

disapprove.example: My parents disapprove of staying up late.

disclose.example: He refused to disclose the secret.

discourse.example: The book is a discourse on freedom.
discourse.example_zh: 這本書是一篇關於自由的論述。

discriminate.example: We should not discriminate against anyone.
Babies learn to discriminate between sounds.
discriminate.example_zh: 嬰兒學會分辨不同的聲音。

discrimination.example: The law bans discrimination at work.
discrimination.example_zh: 法律禁止職場上的歧視。

disrupt.example: The storm disrupted the bus service.
disrupt.example_zh: 暴風雨打亂了公車的營運。
